videos.headline: Jadan Baugh extends Florida's lead with 55-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Jadan Baugh sprints past the LSU defense and gives Florida a 27-16 lead in the final minutes vs. LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jadan Baugh extends Florida's lead with 55-yard rushing TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Kelly gets into it with LSU players on the sideline
videos.description: LSU coach Brian Kelly is caught on camera screaming at one player and getting yelled at by another.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brian Kelly gets into it with LSU players on the sideline) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida comes up with a big stop on 4th down
videos.description: Florida thwarts LSU's fourth-down attempt to give the Gators' offense good field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida comes up with a big stop on 4th down) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Elijhah Badger makes a nice TD catch to give Florida the lead
videos.description: DJ Lagway throws a nice pass to Elijhah Badger to give Florida the 7-0 lead over LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Elijhah Badger makes a nice TD catch to give Florida the lead) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU OL recovers loose ball, proceeds to fumble again as Florida take over
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier fumbles the ball, but Emory Jones Jr. recovers the ball for LSU, then gives it right back as Florida forces the fumble and recovers the ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU OL recovers loose ball, proceeds to fumble again as Florida take over) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'kobi Jackson punches in the TD for Florida
videos.description: Ja'kobi Jackson rushes in the 1-yard touchdown to give Florida the lead over LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'kobi Jackson punches in the TD for Florida) 2024/11/16 ESHEET
